title: Bernstein MCP Catalog
description: Schema for the community catalog of installable MCP servers consumed by `bernstein mcp catalog`. The fetch is rejected wholesale on any unknown field or any missing required field; the cached copy is preserved on validation failure.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the catalog was last regenerated.

id.description: Slug used as the install argument. Must be unique within a catalog.

description.description: One-paragraph summary of what the server provides.

install_command.description: Argv-style command run inside the sandbox to install the server. Must NOT be a shell string.

version_pin.description: Exact version string pinned by this catalog entry. Used to detect upgrades.

verified_by_bernstein.description: Whether the Bernstein team has reviewed this entry. Unverified entries surface a warning in the install preview.

auto_upgrade.description: When true, the upgrade subcommand auto-applies new version pins. Defaults to false.

signature.description: Optional detached signature over the manifest entry. Verification is best-effort in v1.9 and lands fully in 2.0.

command.description: Executable Bernstein writes into the user's MCP config under the bernstein-managed block.

args.description: Argv passed to `command` when launching the server.

env.description: Environment variables Bernstein writes into the bernstein-managed block.
